baseline.note: no legacy ledger â accounting started clean; absorbed 4 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 2 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade â learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With 53 settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (overall WR 0.604, avg_ev_after_cost 0.116) driven by a handful of buckets that already exceed n=8 and clear breakeven; DOWN_STRONG, normal BB state, 120-240 s TTC, strong-trend ADX and bearish-aligned MTF stand out as confirmed. Most other slices remain too thin or mixed to trust. No material change possible versus prior because this is the first observation window.
failing: expansion_up / expansion_down BB (combined n=19, both negative EV)
warnings: total n=53 still small; many high-WR buckets sit just above the n=8 cutoff
UP direction and all weak-signal levels remain unprofitable
positive EV concentrated in low-spread, dead-volume, neutral-funding regimes only
changes_since_last: first analysis window; no prior results to compare
focus_next: accumulate more samples inside normal BB + 120-240 s TTC + bearish MTF intersection
track whether DOWN_STRONG edge persists once n>80
monitor degradation in the currently negative long-TTC and active-volume slices

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 0.6038 and +1.35 USD pnl show modest positive EV (avg 0.116 after cost), driven by trending regime, DOWN_STRONG signals, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, bearish-aligned MTF, and sell-pressure CVD; most other buckets remain too small or mixed to confirm. Patterns with n>=8 and win rates comfortably above breakeven after costs are now tentatively confirmed while sub-8 buckets are noise. No material changes possible as this is the first analysis.
changes_since_last: first analysis; no prior results to compare

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and +1.35 USD pnl shows modest positive EV (avg 0.116) concentrated in DOWN_STRONG (n=26, 69.2% WR), trending regime (n=50), normal BB state (n=16), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19); all other buckets with n>=8 are either marginal or negative after costs.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=50), normal BB state (n=16), 120-240s TTC (n=26), bearish-aligned MTF (n=12), sell-pressure CVD (n=19), and strong ADX (n=31) show confirmed positive EV (win-rates 0.64-0.83, avg_ev_after_cost 0.11-0.14) while UP signals and long-hold or active-volume buckets remain marginal or negative. Sample size still limits precision on most sub-buckets; overall edge is modest but directionally consistent with selectivity toward DOWN/trending conditions.

With n=53 total, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, wr=0.692), trending regime (n=50, wr=0.64), 120-240s TTC (n=26, wr=0.731), normal BB state (n=16, wr=0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, wr=0.833) and sell_pressure CVD (n=19, wr=0.737) show confirmed positive EV above breakeven after costs; UP signals, >=240s TTC, active volume and range_top are reliably negative. Most other buckets remain too small or mixed to confirm.

With n=53 settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (overall wr 0.604, avg_ev_after_cost 0.116) driven by a handful of buckets that meet n>=8 and clear statistical thresholds; DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD and strong-ADX regimes are confirmed profitable while most other slices remain noisy or negative. Sample is still small and heavily skewed toward low-spread, v6, neutral-funding conditions so selectivity remains the dominant edge. No material change possible yet as this is the first observation window.
changes_since_last: first analysis - no prior window to compare

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=50), normal BB state (n=16), 120-240s TTC (n=26), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12), and sell_pressure CVD (n=19) show confirmed positive EV and WR well above breakeven. UP signals, >=240s TTC, active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states remain negative or marginal. Overall edge is modest but directionally consistent after costs.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and z-score -2..1 buckets show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.65-0.83, n>=12) after costs. UP signals, long TTC (>=240s), active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states remain unprofitable or noisy despite some positive avg EV. Overall edge is modest but real in select slices; most other buckets are under-sampled or overfit.

With 53 settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (overall WR 0.604, avg_ev_after_cost 0.116) driven by a handful of buckets that already exceed n=8 and clear breakeven; DOWN_STRONG, normal BB state, 120-240 s TTC, strong-trend ADX and bearish-aligned MTF stand out as confirmed. Most other slices remain too thin or mixed to trust. No material change possible versus prior because this is the first observation window.
changes_since_last: first analysis window; no prior results to compare

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Satoshi-era dormant whale wallet awakens and sells 13,700 BTC in one go (reported ~06:37 GMT)
BTC ETF outflows continue: ~$1.79B over 5 days, price action near $60k with deleveraging
Recent X discussion on spot selling via ETFs rotating capital to semis/KI, un-cleared longs

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 61.2% win rate on 103 settled trades yields +$2.71 (profit factor 1.01), but calibration shows the model is NOT predicting direction better than random (signal hit rate 45.3% vs 38.8% baseline is statistically noise). The 83-down/20-up split and 63.9% down-win vs 50% up-win suggests a DOWN structural bias, not skill. Execution gate rejected 168 trades for 'underdog_price_below_floor,' indicating the bot is sniping mispriced underdog tailâthis is the *actual* edge, not directional forecasting.

knob_recommendations.reason: No context slices have â¥50 settled trades; raise threshold to prevent overfitting phantom patterns in small-n buckets
DOWN trades show 63.9% win rate vs 50% UP; tighten DOWN filter to entry_price â¤0.38 to preserve structural underdog-snipe edge
UP trades are 50% win rate (coin flip) with -$6.35 PnL; disable UP until â¥100 samples show >55% win rate
168 rejects for underdog_price_below_floor; current floor is too highâlower to 0.25 to capture more mispriced tail without violating tick size

new_lessons.rule: TradingView MTF signal hit rate 45.3% (vs 38.8% base) is statistically zero; do NOT trade on directional convictionâedge is mispricing arbitrage only
DOWN: 63.9% win, +$7.71 PnL (n=83); UP: 50% win, -$6.35 PnL (n=20). Asymmetry is not alphaâit's market structure (underdog floor rejects 168 UP candidates). Exploit DOWN underdog tail only.
Brier 0.243 < baseline 0.25 but log-loss 0.683 is poor; edge_model calibration bins show no monotonic trend (0.3-0.4 bin: 31.4% empirical_up). Model is curve-fit noiseâdo NOT size by confidence.

168/175 rejects are underdog_price_below_floor; the gate is correctly filtering non-mispriced bets. The 103 accepted trades are *selection artifacts*âloosen floor to 0.25 cautiously and measure if win rate holds.
PF 1.01 on 103 trades is <1 std dev from breakeven (avg_loss $4.63 vs avg_win $2.98 suggests tail risk). Do NOT scale until PF â¥1.15 on â¥200 settled trades.

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: TradingView 2-4min timeframe signals have no predictive edge on 5min BTC outcomes (45% vs 39% base); treat as noise, not signal
DOWN win rate (63.4%) is higher than UP (50%), but DOWN trades were 4x more frequentâthis is filter selection bias, not a tradable DOWN edge
168/277 execution gate rejections for underdog_price_below_floor indicate edge model outputs sub-viable edges; tighten model threshold or raise gate floor
Profit factor 1.0007 with avg_loss > avg_win means any transaction cost increase or slippage wipes edge; do not trade until PF > 1.05 on 500+ samples
TradingView MTF signal hit rate 45.3% (vs 38.8% base) is statistically zero; do NOT trade on directional convictionâedge is mispricing arbitrage only
DOWN: 63.9% win, +$7.71 PnL (n=83); UP: 50% win, -$6.35 PnL (n=20). Asymmetry is not alphaâit's market structure (underdog floor rejects 168 UP candidates). Exploit DOWN underdog tail only.
Brier 0.243 < baseline 0.25 but log-loss 0.683 is poor; edge_model calibration bins show no monotonic trend (0.3-0.4 bin: 31.4% empirical_up). Model is curve-fit noiseâdo NOT size by confidence.

168/175 rejects are underdog_price_below_floor; the gate is correctly filtering non-mispriced bets. The 103 accepted trades are *selection artifacts*âloosen floor to 0.25 cautiously and measure if win rate holds.
PF 1.01 on 103 trades is <1 std dev from breakeven (avg_loss $4.63 vs avg_win $2.98 suggests tail risk). Do NOT scale until PF â¥1.15 on â¥200 settled trades.

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

proposal.description: Both 5m windows (2:35-2:40 and 2:40-2:45) are strict subintervals of the 15m window (2:30-2:45)

violation.description: Both 5m windows (2:35-2:40 and 2:40-2:45) are strict subintervals of the 15m window (2:30-2:45)

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

Bitcoin Up or Down - June 28, 2:30AM-2:45AM ET

tv_confidence_tier.note: TV confidence tier modulates min_edge/max_price only; never forces or blocks.

key_risks: model_vs_market favors CEX but TV not aligned
grok_decision.rationale: CEX lead strong+confirmed but TV conflict + breakeven tight + in_entry_band=false -> abstain
grok_decision.tv_read: MTF conflict across 2m/3m/4m; no reliable direction, only weak conflicting signals.
grok_decision.mispricing_read: Strong confirmed up divergence (cex_p_up=1.0 vs poly 0.775).
